title: CDP x402 server config
description: JSON config file loaded by `createX402Server({ configPath })` from @coinbase/cdp-sdk/x402. Mirrors CdpX402ServerConfig (minus `configPath`). Inline config passed to createX402Server() always wins over values in this file. Security: this file may carry credentials — prefer environment variables for CDP_API_KEY_ID / CDP_API_KEY_SECRET / CDP_WALLET_SECRET and reserve this file for `routes`; if secrets are stored here, keep the file out of version control.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

apiKeyId.description: CDP API key ID. Falls back to the CDP_API_KEY_ID env var. Prefer the env var over committing this.

apiKeySecret.description: CDP API key secret. Falls back to the CDP_API_KEY_SECRET env var. Do not commit this — prefer the env var.

walletSecret.description: CDP wallet secret used to provision the receiver wallet. Falls back to the CDP_WALLET_SECRET env var. Not required when payToConfig.type is "address". Do not commit this — prefer the env var.

environment.description: Deployment environment controlling default networks. `production` (default) → Base mainnet + Solana mainnet; `development` → Base Sepolia + Solana Devnet. Falls back to the CDP_X402_SERVER_ENVIRONMENT env var.

payToConfig.description: How receiver payTo addresses are resolved. Defaults to { "type": "eoa" }.

accountName.description: Named CDP account to use. Defaults to "x402-receiver-wallet-1".

oneOf.description: Provision a CDP Smart Contract Wallet.

accountName.description: Named CDP smart account. Defaults to "x402-receiver-wallet-1".

ownerAccountName.description: Owner EOA account name. Required for the "smart" type.

oneOf.description: Use provided addresses directly — no wallet provisioning (CDP_WALLET_SECRET not required).

routes.description: Map of "METHOD /path" → route config, e.g. "GET /report". Each value is either the simplified CDP route format or a full x402 RouteConfig; the two may be mixed.

cdpRouteConfig.description: Simplified CDP route format. `price` is the only required field.

price.description: Payment amount required to access this route, e.g. "$0.01".

description.description: Human-readable description of what this route provides.

scheme.description: Payment scheme. Defaults to "exact". "upto" is EVM-only.

networks.description: CAIP-2 networks the route accepts. Defaults to Base mainnet + Solana mainnet for "exact" (or the environment's testnet equivalents), and EVM-only for "upto".

maxTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds a payment token is valid before expiry. Defaults to 300.

extensions.description: Extension overrides. CDP extensions are auto-injected; use this to override the auto-generated Bazaar declaration with richer discovery metadata.

payTo.description: Receiver address. Leave as "" (empty) to have createX402Server fill in the provisioned/configured address for the option's network family.

x402RouteConfig.description: Full x402 RouteConfig format. Use an `accepts` array (or single object) of payment options.
